title: HRZNtrhi's Silver Linings Texture Pack
description: A simple recolouring that alters PvP essentials to a silver and vibrant colour!
body:
This texture pack simply adds a recolouring of certain PvP items to provide a clean and vibrant silver finish.

This includes:
- Totem of Undying
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Netherite Pickaxe
- Crossbow
- Bow
- Mace (Breach and Density)
- End Crystal
